title: Electronics Manufacturing - Elite South Texas
content:
Our electronic manufacturing flooring offers extreme durability to withstand heavy traffic while being electrostatic dissipative. Unlike traditional ESD coatings, our electrostatic dissipative flooring does not require reapplication over time to maintain proper conductivity. These seamless flooring systems are fluid-applied in place with minimal downtime and can include safety markings and demarcation. The surfaces are also chemical resistant and offer slip resistant options.
Advantages
Electrostatic dissipative surfaces
Quick install option available for minimal downtime
Easy to maintain
Optional safety markings and demarcation
For new or existing concrete
Antimicrobial
Suitable for high traffic and heavy machinery
Suitable for extreme hot and cold environments
Slip resistant options available
Stain and chemical resistant to acids, oils, petrochemicals, cleaning chemicals, etc.
Electronics assembly
Sensitive electronic manufacturing
Electronic clean rooms
Medical facilities
Storage areas for electronics
Medical equipment manufacturing
Server rooms
ESD Flooring
